text:
In Memoriam is an omake at the end of most volumes of the manga showing most of the characters who died in that volume flying up to heaven.

Deaths

The following is a list of characters in the In Memoriam section for each volume of the manga.

Volume 1

Cornello

Volume 2

Nina Tucker
Alexander
Shou Tucker (shown burning in hell rather than ascending to heaven)

Volume 3

Laboratory 5 Guard

Volume 4

Maes Hughes
Slicer Brothers

Volume 5

Trisha Elric
Chiko the cat

Volume 6

Various animals eaten by the Elrics and foxes on Yock Island
The result of the Human Transmutation performed by the Elrics.

Volume 7

Everyone at the Devil's Nest

Volume 8

Greed
Roa
Martel
Dolcetto

Volume 9

A confused Maria Ross

Volume 10

Barry the Chopper (both bodies)
Lust
Maria Ross (only the bottom half of her body & falling down from heaven as she's shown to have survived)

Volume 11

Giolio Comanche

Volume 15

Sara Rockbell
Urey Rockbell
Everyone who died during the Ishval War

Volume 17

Raven
Two of the Briggs soldiers killed by Pride

Volume 20

Bido

Volume 21

Gluttony

Volume 22

Gardner
Other Central Command members
Ishvalans killed by Kimblee
A soldier killed by the Lesser Homunculi

Volume 23

Solf J. Kimblee
Envy
Central City Troops
Lesser Homunculi

Volume 24

Sloth
Briggs Soldiers
Central Troops
Lesser Homunculi

Volume 25

Buccaneer
Fu
Führer candidates

Volume 26

Führer Bradley/Wrath

Volume 27

Across the panel it says "Spoiler prevention in effect for the final volume."

Trivia

Shou Tucker is the only character seen in hell rather than heaven.
